hibernate-mapping.query: Select payrollRun from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun where exists( Select payrollRun.Company.Id from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.Company as company, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.CompanyEvent as companyEvent where company.Id = :companyId and payrollRun.Company.Id= company.Id and companyEvent.Company.Id=company.Id and companyEvent.EventTypeCd = :eventTypeCd group by payrollRun.Company.Id having min(companyEvent.StatusEffectiveDate) < :earliestPayrollRunDateMin ) and payrollRun.Company.Id = :companyId and payrollRun.PayrollRunStatus in ('Complete','OffloadedAll','OffloadedDebit')

Select distinct payrollRun from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where payrollRun.Company.SourceSystemCd=:sourceSystemCd and finTxn.Company.Id=payrollRun.Company.Id and payrollRun.PayrollRunStatus=:payrollStatus and payrollRun.Id=finTxn.PayrollRun.Id and finTxn.TransactionType=:transactionType and finTxn.SettlementDate between :lowerBound and :upperBound

Select distinct payrollRun from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as finTxn where payrollRun.Company = :company and payrollRun.Id = finTxn.PayrollRun.Id and finTxn.TransactionType = :transactionType and finTxn.CurrentTransactionState = :createdState and finTxn.SettlementTypeCd = :settlementType order by payrollRun.PaycheckSettlementDate asc

select distinct pr from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as pr, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.FinancialTransaction as ft where pr.Id = ft.PayrollRun.Id and pr.Company.SourceSystemCd = :sourceSystemCd and pr.PayrollRunStatus in (:statusList) and ft.SettlementDate >= FN_DATE_ADD(pr.CreatedDate, -2 , 'day') and ft.MoneyMovementTransaction.InitiationDate between :initDateMinus30 and :initDate and ft.MoneyMovementTransaction.MoneyMovementPaymentMethod = 'ACHDirectDeposit' and ft.MoneyMovementTransaction.Company = ft.Company order by pr.CreatedDate, pr.PaycheckSettlementDate asc
hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select /*+ index(ft PSP_FINANCIAL_TRANSACTION_FK5) index(pr PSP_PAYROLL_RUN_I2) */ distinct pr.* from psp_payroll_run pr join psp_financial_transaction ft on ft.payroll_run_fk = pr.payroll_run_seq and ft.company_fk = pr.company_fk join psp_money_movement_transaction mmt on mmt.money_movement_transaction_seq = ft.money_movement_transaction_fk and mmt.company_fk = ft.company_fk join psp_company c on c.company_seq = pr.company_fk where c.source_system_cd = :sourceSystemCd and pr.payroll_run_status in (:statusList) and ft.settlement_date >= pr.created_date - 2 and ft.on_hold = 1 and ft.current_transaction_state_fk in ('Created', 'Cancelled') and mmt.initiation_date between sys_extract_utc(:initDateMinus30) and sys_extract_utc(:initDate) and mmt.money_movement_payment_method = 'ACHDirectDeposit' order by pr.created_date, pr.paycheck_settlement_date asc

select /*+ index(ft PSP_FINANCIAL_TRANSACTION_FK5) index(pr PSP_PAYROLL_RUN_I2) */ distinct pr.payroll_run_seq from psp_payroll_run pr join psp_financial_transaction ft on ft.payroll_run_fk = pr.payroll_run_seq and ft.company_fk = pr.company_fk join psp_money_movement_transaction mmt on mmt.money_movement_transaction_seq = ft.money_movement_transaction_fk and mmt.company_fk = ft.company_fk join psp_company c on c.company_seq = pr.company_fk where c.source_system_cd = :sourceSystemCd and pr.payroll_run_status in (:statusList) and ft.settlement_date >= pr.created_date - 2 and ft.on_hold = 1 and ft.current_transaction_state_fk in ('Created', 'Cancelled') and mmt.initiation_date between sys_extract_utc(:initDateMinus30) and sys_extract_utc(:initDate) and mmt.money_movement_payment_method = 'ACHDirectDeposit'

select distinct pr.* from psp_payroll_run pr join psp_financial_transaction ft on ft.payroll_run_fk = pr.payroll_run_seq and ft.company_fk = pr.company_fk join psp_money_movement_transaction mmt on mmt.money_movement_transaction_seq = ft.money_movement_transaction_fk and mmt.company_fk = ft.company_fk join psp_company c on c.company_seq = pr.company_fk where c.source_system_cd = :sourceSystemCd and pr.payroll_run_status in (:statusList) and ft.settlement_date >= pr.created_date - interval '2' day and ft.on_hold = 1 and ft.current_transaction_state_fk in ('Created', 'Cancelled') and mmt.initiation_date between timezone('UTC',cast (:initDateMinus30 AS timestamptz)) and timezone('UTC',cast (:initDate AS timestamptz)) and mmt.money_movement_payment_method = 'ACHDirectDeposit' order by pr.created_date, pr.paycheck_settlement_date asc

select distinct pr.payroll_run_seq from psp_payroll_run pr join psp_financial_transaction ft on ft.payroll_run_fk = pr.payroll_run_seq and ft.company_fk = pr.company_fk join psp_money_movement_transaction mmt on mmt.money_movement_transaction_seq = ft.money_movement_transaction_fk and mmt.company_fk = ft.company_fk join psp_company c on c.company_seq = pr.company_fk where c.source_system_cd = :sourceSystemCd and pr.payroll_run_status in (:statusList) and ft.settlement_date >= pr.created_date - interval '2' day and ft.on_hold = 1 and ft.current_transaction_state_fk in ('Created', 'Cancelled') and mmt.initiation_date between timezone('UTC',cast (:initDateMinus30 AS timestamptz)) and timezone('UTC',cast (:initDate AS timestamptz)) and mmt.money_movement_payment_method = 'ACHDirectDeposit'
hibernate-mapping.query: Select payrollRun2 from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun1, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun2 where payrollRun1.Company = payrollRun2.Company and payrollRun1.SourcePayRunId = :sourcePayRunId and payrollRun2.SourcePayRunId != :sourcePayRunId and payrollRun2.PaycheckSettlementDate < payrollRun1.PaycheckSettlementDate and payrollRun2.PayrollRunDate <= payrollRun1.PayrollRunDate and payrollRun1.PayrollRunType = 'Regular' and payrollRun2.PayrollRunType = 'Regular' and payrollRun1.Company = :company order by payrollRun2.PaycheckSettlementDate desc, payrollRun2.PayrollRunDate desc

Select payrollRun2 from com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun1, com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.PayrollRun as payrollRun2 where payrollRun1.Company = payrollRun2.Company and payrollRun1.SourcePayRunId = :sourcePayRunId and payrollRun2.SourcePayRunId != :sourcePayRunId and payrollRun2.PaycheckSettlementDate > payrollRun1.PaycheckSettlementDate and payrollRun2.PayrollRunDate >= payrollRun1.PayrollRunDate and payrollRun1.PayrollRunType = 'Regular' and payrollRun2.PayrollRunType = 'Regular' and payrollRun1.Company = :company order by payrollRun2.PaycheckSettlementDate asc, payrollRun2.PayrollRunDate asc
